qa.notes: The location is correct for the mission, showing a massive steel gate with a keypad in a dark tunnel, matching the 'M9: לוח המקשים מהבהב באדום' description. The style is cinematic photorealistic, and there are no prominent foreground characters or oversaturated colors. The image effectively conveys the tension and challenge of the mission.

director.notes: WRONG SUBJECT. M9 brief: 'לוח המקשים מהבהב באדום... השער יינעל הרמטית' — keypad console flashing red, 60-second countdown to hermetic gate lock, entrance to tunnel with massive steel gate. This asset shows industrial/sci-fi interior with wrong aesthetic (military bunker/facility, not ancient temple ruins). Narrative context: player has just climbed rock face (M8), arrived at temple entrance. This should be photorealistic ancient stone temple gate with electronic lock system (anachronistic tech in old structure), NOT cyberpunk industrial corridor. Lighting is moody/dramatic (good) but setting completely misses tropical adventure/lost city genre. Camera angle acceptable (ground-level POV) but subject is entirely wrong location type. REDO with: ancient weathered stone archway/gate, jungle vines, temple architecture, electronic keypad mounted anachronistically on ancient door, countdown timer visible, hermetic steel door embedded in stone frame — blend Indiana Jones aesthetic with modern security tech.

attempts.prompt: Ground-level POV faces a towering ancient stone archway, weathered temple gate sealed by incongruous modern hermetic steel door embedded in millennia-old carved limestone. Foreground layer: electronic keypad console mounted chest-height on moss-covered stone pillar, backlit red countdown display pulsing 00:58... 00:57, thick jungle vines draping over console edges, scattered carved stone fragments

qa.notes: The location is appropriate for M9, showing an ancient stone structure with a massive steel gate and a keypad, which aligns with the 'מנהרה עם שער פלדה מסיבי' and 'לוח המקשים מהבהב באדום' description. The style is cinematic photorealistic. There are no prominent foreground characters or oversaturated colors. The timer on the keypad counts down, adding dynamic realism.

director.notes: bg_M9 reads instantly and correctly. Ancient temple entrance with massive steel door, keypad countdown timer (58→56→54s), overgrown with jungle vines, ground-level POV. Matches M9 brief perfectly: 'לוח המקשים מהבהב באדום. אם לא אקיש את הקוד ב-60 השניות הקרובות, השער יינעל הרמטית...' The countdown is visible and red, the steel gate is monumental and hermetically sealed, the jungle reclamation signals abandonment. Cinematic photorealism holds, muted tropical saturation consistent with camera bible. Strong vanishing point through the door archway provides depth layers. The keypad is intentional text (digital readout) per audit brief §2—allowed as part of mission design. No visual bias detected: the three tool options (שמן לשימון צירים / רב-כלי / מבער ריתוך) will be composited separately; this bg does not pre-answer which is 'correct.' Lighting and atmosphere appropriately tense but neutral. Player will composite cleanly. Usable.

attempts.prompt: Wide cinematic view from cliff edge looking down 50 meters toward churning waterfall base, early evening golden hour. Camera positioned at ground level on weathered stone precipice, slow drift forward toward the drop. Foreground layer: broken wooden safety barrier remnants and moss-covered boulders frame the edges, sharp focus. Mid-ground layer: massive cascading waterfall catches warm backlight,

qa.notes: The location clearly depicts a waterfall with a boat, aligning perfectly with the mission's description of a 'מצוק של 50 מטר מעל מפל מים' and a 'סירת המילוט האחרונה' that is 'מתחילה להתרחק'. The style is cinematic photorealistic, and there are no prominent foreground characters or oversaturated colors. The broken wooden fence in the foreground adds to the adventurous feel.

director.notes: Strong match for M11 'מצוק של 50 מטר מעל מפל מים'. Dramatic waterfall cascading into churning river below, massive vertical drop clearly established, wooden platform/dock remnants in foreground reinforce cliff-top POV and the escape boat context. Cinematic photorealistic tropical adventure aesthetic maintained—muted saturation, atmospheric mist, hard backlighting creating depth. Ground-level slight low-angle perspective appropriate for player standing at cliff edge. Three-layer depth (foreground rocks/platform, mid-ground rapids, background falls/jungle canopy) reads instantly. The urgency of the 50m drop and the boat escaping downstream is visceral. No visual bias toward any tool choice—all three M11 tools (חבל סנפלינג, חבל בנג'י, מצנח בסיס) are equally plausible responses to this location. Consistent with established tropical adventure visual language across all prior backgrounds. No hallucinated text/logos. Framerate stable across 4 keyframes, no green-screen spill visible. This is the cliff-above-waterfall money shot the mission demands.

director.notes: Background reads instantly as M12 location — river shore with beached boat, jungle/cave entrance atmosphere, wet footprints visible on sand leading toward darker vegetation (matching 'עקבות רטובים מובילים פנימה'). Boat silhouette prominent in foreground establishes the 'סירת מתחרים עוגנת' element. Cinematic ground-level POV with strong atmospheric depth (mist, layered jungle, distant peaks). Muted tropical saturation consistent with Camera Bible. Shore + boat + cave-mouth direction = correct M12 setup for player composite. Minor: some frames show slight green cast on rocks — acceptable as jungle reflected light, doesn't break tropical realism. PASS for delivery.
